scripts.dev: npm run setup && npm run dev -w @lingospeak/web
scripts.dev:api: npm run setup && npm run env:check && npm run services:up && npm run db:prepare && npm run start:dev -w @lingospeak/api
scripts.start:api: npm run setup && npm run env:check && npm run services:up && npm run db:prepare && npm run start -w @lingospeak/api
scripts.verify: npm run db:format && npm run db:validate && npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test && npm run build
scripts.services:up: docker compose up -d --wait postgres redis minio && docker compose run --rm --no-deps minio-init
scripts.db:prepare: npm run db:generate && npm run db:validate && npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed
scripts.db:setup: npm run setup && npm run env:check && npm run services:up && npm run db:prepare
